Need help with this page?

I paid my last bill, but my account is still showing a balance. What should I do?
Processing time is required for all online payments, pre-authorized payments and payments made at a financial institution, and even longer for payments made by cheque.

If more than five business days have passed since you made your payment, and you're concerned it wasn't received or accurately processed, please contact customer service: natural gas / electricity.

Can I combine my natural gas and electricity bills into a single payment?
No, these bills must be paid separately.

How do I access more information about my account?
Click on your account number to display more details about your account. If you have more than one account linked to your profile, you can view these accounts by clicking on the switch accounts link located at the top right corner of your accounts page.

How do I view all service addresses associated with my consolidated account?
Click on show service addresses located under your account number to view a list of addresses associated with the account.

Link your accounts

If you have other FortisBC accounts, you can link them now or at any time by selecting Link accounts from the Online profile menu or the Shortcuts menu.


Advanced gas meter exchanges are now underway

We’re exchanging existing gas meters with wireless advanced gas meters to enable remote meter reading and other future benefits.

Learn more

Supporting the places we all call home

We’re building stronger communities by supporting the people helping to make a better B.C. From local programs to Indigenous partnerships, we’re investing where it matters most.

Learn how we support our communities.

Protect your household from CO exposure

Have your gas appliances serviced annually by a licensed contractor to help stay safe and prevent carbon monoxide exposure.

Learn more
